title: PACT RFC 9457 Problem Detail Extensions
description: JSON Schema for PACT extension members in RFC 9457 problem detail responses. Validates the public projection of ontology error semantics.

type.description: RFC 9457 type URI. MUST match pattern: https://pact.example/problems/{PACT_ERROR_CODE}

title.description: RFC 9457 human-readable summary. Non-contractual — clients MUST NOT branch on this value.

status.description: RFC 9457 HTTP status code. MUST match actual HTTP response status.

detail.description: RFC 9457 human-readable explanation. Non-contractual — clients MUST NOT branch on this value.

instance.description: RFC 9457 URI reference identifying the specific occurrence. Used for audit correlation with internal evidence chain.

pact_error_code.description: Stable machine code from ontology error taxonomy. MUST be annotated projection:public in ontology.

pact_domain.description: Pack domain identifier. MUST match the domain in the originating pack descriptor.

pact_schema_version.description: Version of this PACT problem extension schema.

pact_deontic.description: Deontic classification of the violated transition. Present when the error relates to a decision-space transition with deontic annotation.

pact_source_ref.description: Regulatory source reference for the deontic classification (e.g., psd3:article:97:1:a). Present when pact_deontic is present and the transition cites a source.

pact_decision_state.description: Current state in the decision-space state model when the error occurred.

pact_risk_band.description: CONDITIONAL: Risk band at time of error. Only present when delivery profile sets rfc9457_projection.risk_band: true.

pact_corridor_id.description: CONDITIONAL: Corridor identifier. Only present when delivery profile sets rfc9457_projection.corridor_id: true.
